summary: The target has at most 10 ships, each coordinate is at most 1000, and the interactive contract imposes a fixed ceiling of 400 oracle calls, so a runtime scaling benchmark cannot honestly model an unbounded workload.

workload_bound.source_constraint: at most 10 ships in a 0-through-1000 coordinate grid and at most 400 hasShips calls

replacement_checks.evidence: Four-way subdivision halves both coordinate spans; only quadrants containing one of at most ten ships continue, and the judge rejects any execution beyond 400 oracle calls.
Regression covers empty and singleton rectangles, inclusive edges, one-cell-wide regions, the full 1001-by-1001 grid, ten ships, exact brute-force counts, and query-cap enforcement.
